betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Geode Block§f (advancedrocketry:geode) is a §6single block§f world-gen block that spawns on §6crystal-rich planets§f in the AR progression — §6crystal worlds§f, §6asteroid belts§f, and certain §6volcanic planets§f with high mineral content. The block has a §6multi-colored, crystalline appearance§f with §6internal structure§f visible.

§6Production Path (world generation)§f:
- Source: §6Geode Block§f is generated by AR's planet dimension system on crystal-rich planets
- It cannot be crafted — it must be §6mined from a crystal planet§f during a landing mission
- Drops: 1x §6Geode Block§f (which can be §6broken down into Crystals§f at the §6Crystallizer§f, 10006) or 4-8x §6Crystals§f directly when mined with a pickaxe

The block is the §6prerequisite§f for the §6Crystals§f (10077) quest. The quest requires the player to mine a §6Geode Block§f and bring it back to the home planet for processing.

This quest is a prerequisite for the §6Crystals§f (10077) and the §6Charcoal Log§f (10078) — the §6crystal production chain§f that feeds the §6Satellite Builder§f (10039) and the §6Astrobody Data Processor§f (10020). The crystal material is the §6core ingredient§f for the §6Vacuum Laser Emitter§f (10014) and the §6Lens Block§f (10013).

§eTip§f: Geodes are most often found §6embedded in basalt blocks§f on volcanic planets or as §6standalone deposits§f on crystal planets. Use a §6Pickaxe with Fortune III§f to maximize the crystal drop rate. The §6Crystallizer§f (10006) can also process geodes into §6specific crystal colors§f (red, blue, yellow, etc.) depending on the §6input material§f.
